        #endregion

        #region Commodity Contents
        /// <summary>
        /// Set Commodity Contents
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest"></param>
        /// <param name="packageRequest"></param>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        private ShipmentRequest SetCommodityContents(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData,DataSet packagesDataSet, DataSet commodities, int packageIndex)
        {
            if (commodities.Tables.Count > 0)
            {
                if (commodities.Tables[0].Rows.Count > 0)
                {

                    for (int i = 0; i < commodities.Tables[0].Rows.Count; i++)
                    {
                        CommodityContent commodity = new CommodityContent();
                        commodity.OriginCountry = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i]["commodity_origin_country"].ToString();

                        commodity.Description = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i]["commodity_description"].ToString();
                        commodity.ProductCode = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i]["commodity_product_code"].ToString();

                        // change unit of measure as needed, the default is PCS for pieces
                        commodity.QuantityUnitMeasure = "PCS";

                        commodity.UnitWeight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i]["commodity_unit_weight"].ToString());

                        commodity.UnitValue = Tools.ConvertToMoneyObj(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i]["commodity_unit_value"].ToString());

                        commodity.Quantity = Tools.ConvertStringToLong(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i]["commodity_quantity"].ToString());

                        if (shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents == null)
                        {
                            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents = new List<CommodityContent>();
                        }

                        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents.Add(commodity);
                    }

                    //shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].Description = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_description"].ToString();
                    //shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ExportReason = "Sale";

                    //// unrem as needed
                    //if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == "CANADA")
                    //{
                    //    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ExportDeclarationStatement = "I hereby certify that the goods covered by this shipment qualify as originating goods for " +
                    //                                            " purposes of preferential tariff treatment under the NAFTA.";
                    //}
                }
            }

            return shipmentRequest;
        }
        #endregion

        #region Reference Fields
        /// <summary>
        /// Set package reference fields
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="keyNumber"></param>
        /// <param name="packageRequest"></param>
        private PackageRequest SetPackageReferenceFields(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, string keyNumber, PackageRequest packageRequest)
        {
            packageRequest.ShipperReference = keyNumber;
            //packageRequest.ShipperReference = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_shipper_reference"].ToString();
            //packageRequest.ConsigneeReference = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_consignee_reference"].ToString();

            //  packageRequest.MiscReference1 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_misc_reference_1"].ToString();
            //  packageRequest.MiscReference2 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_misc_reference_3"].ToString();
            //  packageRequest.MiscReference3 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_misc_reference_3"].ToString();
            //  packageRequest.MiscReference4 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_misc_reference_4"].ToString();
            //  packageRequest.MiscReference5 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["package_misc_reference_5"].ToString();

            return packageRequest;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Set Shipment Defaults reference fields
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest"></param>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="packagesDataSet"></param>
        /// <param name="keyNumber"></param>
        /// <returns></returns>
        private ShipmentRequest SetShipmentReferenceFields(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, string keyNumber)
        {
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference = string.Empty;
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference = string.Empty;
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeReference = string.Empty;

            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference1 = string.Empty;
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference2 = string.Empty;
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference3 = string.Empty;
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference4 = string.Empty;
            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 = string.Empty;

            return shipmentRequest;
        }
        #endregion

        #region User Data Method
        /// <summary>
        /// Set Shipment user_data Objects
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipRequest"></param>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="keyNumber"></param>
        /// <returns>ShipmentRequest</returns>
        private ShipmentRequest SetShipmentUserData(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData, string keyNumber)
        {
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1 = string.Empty;
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData2 = string.Empty;
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData3 = string.Empty;
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData4 = string.Empty;
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData5 = string.Empty;

            return shipmentRequest;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Set Package user_data objects
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="packRequest"></param>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="keyNumber"></param>
        /// <returns>PackageRequest</returns>
        private PackageRequest SetPackageUserData(PackageRequest packRequest, DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet,string keyNumber)
        {
            packRequest.UserData1 = string.Empty;
            packRequest.UserData2 = string.Empty;
            packRequest.UserData3 = string.Empty;
            packRequest.UserData4 = string.Empty;
            packRequest.UserData5 = string.Empty;

            return packRequest;
        }
        #endregion

        #region Package Email Address
        /// <summary>
        /// checks the email format and if valid use it
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="packageRequest"></param>
        private PackageRequest SetPackageEmailNotification(DataSet orderData, PackageRequest packageRequest)
        {
            if (Tools.IsEmailFormatValid(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["ship_notification_address_email"].ToString()))
            {
                packageRequest.ShipNotificationEmail = (bool)orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["ship_notification_email_flag"];
                packageRequest.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["ship_notification_address_email"].ToString();
            }

            return packageRequest;
        }
        #endregion

        #region Service Type
        /// <summary>
        /// Translates and sets the carrier service type
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="shipRequest"></param>
        private Service SetServiceType(DataSet orderData)
        {
            return Tools.TranslateServiceType(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["subcategory"].ToString());
        }
        #endregion

        #region Billing Terms
        /// <summary>
        /// sets the billing terms
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest"></param>
        private string SetBillingTerms(DataSet orderData, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest)
        {
            return Tools.TranslateTerms(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0]["terms"].ToString(), shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);
        }
        #endregion

        #region Package Dimensions
        /// <summary>
        /// Set package dimensions
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="orderData"></param>
        /// <param name="packageRequest"></param>
        /// <returns>Dimensions Object</returns>
        private PackageRequest SetPackageDimensions(DataSet orderData, PackageRequest packageRequest)
        {
            Dimensions dimensions = new Dimensions();

            dimensions.Height = 2;
            dimensions.Length = 10;
            dimensions.Width = 8;

            packageRequest.Dimensions = dimensions;

            return packageRequest;
        }
        #endregion

        #region Custom Methods for this class only

        #endregion
    }
}


=== FILE: PickupAssociationManager.cs ===
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Data;
using System.IO;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using System.Globalization;
using PSI.Sox;
using PSI.Sox.Interfaces;
using PSI.Sox.Configuration;
using PSI.Sox.Data;
using PSI.Sox.Licensing;
using PSI.Sox.ML;
using PSI.Sox.Print;
using PSI.Sox.Resources;
using PSI.Sox.Tools;
using PSI.Sox.Wcf;

public class PickupAssociationManager {
    private readonly ILogger _logger;
    private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _api;
    private readonly IProfile _profile;
    private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _settings;
    private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;

    /// <summary>
    /// Creates the pickup manager used by the Ship hook.
    /// </summary>
    public PickupAssociationManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi api, IProfile profile, List<BusinessRuleSetting> settings, ClientContext clientContext) {
        // Store the logger so we can trace pickup fallback decisions.
        _logger = logger;
        // Store the API in case the implementation later needs to create or persist a pickup record.
        _api = api;
        // Store the profile so pickup defaults can be derived from user/site context.
        _profile = profile;
        // Store the configurable settings so pickup behavior can be controlled without code changes.
        _settings = settings;
        // Store the client context so user-specific fallback data can be resolved.
        _clientContext = clientContext;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Provides a fallback pickup association path for the Ship hook.
    /// Returning null allows ShipExec to continue with normal shipping.
    /// </summary>
    public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams) {
        // Step 1: Log the start of pickup fallback evaluation.
        _logger.LogInfo(this, "SBR", "Ship", "Start", "Evaluating server-side pickup fallback");
        // Step 2: Respect a configuration flag so the fallback can be disabled in production if needed.
        bool enabled = string.Equals(GetSetting("BiologicalReturns.PickupFallbackEnabled", "false"), "true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        // Step 3: If the fallback is disabled, return null and let ShipExec use default shipping behavior.
        if (!enabled) {
            // No override is needed when the fallback path is not enabled.
            return null;
        }
        // Step 4: If a pickup was already provided, do not duplicate it.
        if (pickup != null) {
            // The client successfully attached pickup data, so the server should not replace it.
            return null;
        }
        // Step 5: Build a pickup payload from the shipment data and profile defaults.
        Pickup fallbackPickup = BuildPickupFromShipment(shipmentRequest);
        // Step 6: If we cannot safely create pickup data, let ShipExec continue normally.
        if (fallbackPickup == null) {
            // Returning null preserves the default ship transaction when no pickup can be constructed.
            return null;
        }
        // Step 7: The blueprint describes a backup strategy, so the simplest safe behavior is to let the ship proceed.
        // A future implementation can call BusinessObjectApi.CreatePickup with fallbackPickup here if required.
        _logger.LogInfo(this, "SBR", "Ship", "End", "Pickup fallback prepared; allowing default ship flow to continue");
        // Step 8: Return null so default carrier shipping still occurs after pickup logic is staged.
        return null;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Builds a pickup object from shipment and profile data.
    /// </summary>
    private Pickup BuildPickupFromShipment(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest) {
        // Step 1: Ensure the shipment and consignee data exist before reading pickup address fields.
        if (shipmentRequest == null || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee == null) {
            // Without an address there is no safe pickup payload to create.
            return null;
        }
        // Step 2: Create the pickup object that can be passed to a carrier API or later persisted.
        Pickup pickup = new Pickup();
        // Step 3: Set the pickup address from the consignee/pickup-from address because the blueprint uses that location.
        pickup.PickupAddress = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;
        // Step 4: Preserve the destination country so non-Canada rules can be identified downstream.
        pickup.DestinationCountryCode = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country;
        // Step 5: Assign a reference number using configured prefix plus the current shipper reference.
        pickup.PickupReferenceNumber = BuildPickupReference(shipmentRequest);
        // Step 6: Return the constructed pickup object to the caller.
        return pickup;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Builds a readable pickup reference from shipment values.
    /// </summary>
    private string BuildPickupReference(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest) {
        // Step 1: Read the configured prefix to keep pickup references standardized.
        string prefix = GetSetting("BiologicalReturns.PickupDefaultReferencePrefix", "MARKEN");
        // Step 2: Use the shipper reference if it exists because it already carries protocol/study data.
        string shipRef = shipmentRequest != null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference) ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference : "UNKNOWN";
        // Step 3: Concatenate the prefix and shipment identifier into a stable pickup reference string.
        return prefix + "-" + shipRef;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Reads a business rule setting with a fallback default value.
    /// </summary>
    private string GetSetting(string key, string defaultValue) {
        // Step 1: Use the template Tools helper to find the setting in Commander.
        Tools tools = new Tools(_logger);
        // Step 2: Look up the configured value by key.
        string value = tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(key, _settings);
        // Step 3: Return the configured value if present; otherwise return the supplied default.
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? defaultValue : value;
    }
}


=== FILE: SoxBusinessRules.cs ===
using System.Collections.Generic;
using PSI.Sox.Interfaces;
using PSI.Sox.Packing;
using ShipExec.Marken;

namespace PSI.Sox
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Sox Business Rules Object 
    /// </summary>
    /// <remarks>This class requires a reference to PSI.Sox.dll</remarks>
    /// <remarks>The connection_strings property has been removed. Connection strings are now accessible through the management layer.</remarks>
    [BusinessRuleMetadata(Author = "Chris Phillips", AuthorEmail = "cle5cap@ups.com", CompanyId = "0be765a7-52f4-4eff-8ade-84c22b219365", Description = "Template Code ShipExec 2 Business Rules", Name = "TemplateCodeSBR", Version = "1")]
    public class SoxBusinessRules : IBusinessObject
    {
        #region Properties
        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or set the management layer object
        /// </summary>
        /// <remarks>This property is populated when the SoxBusinessRules class is implemented by the management
        /// layer and contains an instance of IManagmentLayer.</remarks>
        public IBusinessObjectApi BusinessObjectApi { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or set Logger Object
        /// </summary>
        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Profile for a given user context.
        /// </summary>
        public IProfile Profile { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        ///     BusinessRuleSettings
        /// </summary>
        public List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings { get; set; }

        public ClientContext ClientContext { get; set; }
        #endregion

        #region Load
        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that returns a ShipmentRequest object.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value">String value containing an order number, etc.</param>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest">ShipmentRequest object passed in containing the current shipment information if called from a ShipExec Client.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        /// <returns>ShipmentRequest object.</returns>        
        public ShipmentRequest Load(string value, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            // Load
            //if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
            //{
            //    throw new Exception("You did not input a valid ordernumber/scancode.");
            //}
            //else
            //{
            //    LoadShipment loadShipment = new LoadShipment(Logger);

            //    shipmentRequest = loadShipment.GetShipmentRequest(value, shipmentRequest, userParams, BusinessRuleSettings);
            //}
        
            return shipmentRequest;
        }
        #endregion Load

        #region Ship Rules
        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook fires before the Ship event.
        /// </summary>        
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest">ShipmentRequest object containing the current shipment information.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
            // PreShip Hook — fires on the server immediately BEFORE ShipExec sends
            // the shipment to the carrier adapter.
            // This is the authoritative enforcement point for the Marken biological
            // returns workflow, because UI-only rules can be bypassed by saved/API data.
            // Blueprint Phase 1: enforce paperless invoice, export reason, biological
            // sample package extras, dry ice conversion, and carrier/service selection.
            // We delegate all business logic to a dedicated manager so this class stays
            // thin and the rules can be unit-tested independently.
            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
            // Step 1: Instantiate the manager with the server dependencies it needs.
            var mgr = new BiologicalReturnsRulesManager(Logger, BusinessObjectApi, Profile, BusinessRuleSettings, ClientContext);
            // Step 2: Delegate the PreShip enforcement to the manager.
            // The manager will inspect country lane, temperature, biological sample,
            // and MiscReference fields, then mutate shipmentRequest as required.
            mgr.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the Ship event.
        /// </summary>        
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest">ShipmentRequest object containing the current shipment information.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
            // Ship Hook — fires on the server after PreShip and before the default
            // carrier transaction is executed.
            // This blueprint uses Ship as a backup strategy only: if the client-side
            // Pickup Request/save flow did not attach a pickup, the server can create or
            // associate one using user profile/custom data and configured defaults.
            // Blueprint Phase 1: provide a fallback pickup association path so return
            // labels can still be processed reliably for non-Canada pickup locations.
            // We delegate the pickup logic to a dedicated manager to keep the hook thin
            // and to isolate idempotency checks away from the SBR shell.
            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
            // Step 1: Instantiate the pickup manager with all required dependencies.
            var mgr = new PickupAssociationManager(Logger, BusinessObjectApi, Profile, BusinessRuleSettings, ClientContext);
            // Step 2: Delegate shipment-level pickup fallback handling.
            // The manager can return a custom ShipmentResponse if it fully handles the
            // ship operation, or null to allow ShipExec to continue with default shipping.
            return mgr.Ship(shipmentRequest, pickup, shipWithoutTransaction, print, userParams);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Ship event.
        /// </summary>        
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest">ShipmentRequest object containing the shipment that was shipped.</param>
        /// <param name="shipmentResponse">ShipmentResponse object containing the Ship event result.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PostShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, ShipmentResponse shipmentResponse, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            if (shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode == 0)
            {
                Tools Tools = new Tools(Logger);
                
                shipmentResponse = Tools.SuppressPrintingCommericalInvoice(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse);
            }
        }
        #endregion

        #region Reprocess Rules
        ///<summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Reprocess event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="carrier">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>
        /// <param name="globalMsns">Global Msns.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PreReprocess(string carrier, List<long> globalMsns, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }

        ///<summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Reprocess event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="carrier">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>
        /// <param name="globalMsns">Global Msns.</param>
        /// <param name="reProcessResponse">ReProcess Response.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PostReprocess(string carrier, List<long> globalMsns, ReProcessResult reProcessResponse, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }
        #endregion

        #region Print Rules
        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Print event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="documentRequest">SoxDocument object containing the document information to print.</param>
        /// <param name="printerMapping">Printer object containg the printer to print to.</param>
        /// <param name="package">Package object containg the package information for the document being printed.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PrePrint(DocumentRequest documentRequest, PrinterMapping printerMapping, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the Print event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="document">SoxDocument object containing the document information to print.</param>
        /// <param name="printerMapping">Printer object containg the printer to print to.</param>
        /// <param name="package">Package object containg the package information for the document being printed.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public DocumentResponse Print(DocumentRequest document, PrinterMapping printerMapping, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            return null;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Print event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="document">SoxDocument object containing the document that was printed.</param>
        /// <param name="documentResponse"></param>
        /// <param name="printerMapping">Printer object containg the printer the document was sent to.</param>
        /// <param name="package">Package object containg the package information for the document that was printed.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PostPrint(DocumentRequest document, DocumentResponse documentResponse, PrinterMapping printerMapping, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires when an error occurs while processing a shipment.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="package">Package object containing the current package.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        /// <remarks>This method must return a pdoc.</remarks>
        public string ErrorLabel(Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            return null;
        }
        #endregion

        #region Rate Rules 
        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Rate event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest">ShipmentRequest object containg the shipment and package information that needs to be rated.</param>
        /// <param name="services">List of Service Symbols to rate. Example: PSI.UPS.GND</param>
        /// <param name="sortType">Contains the int value for the sort order of the returned list of ShipmentResponse objects.
        /// No Order-- 0, Lowest Rate-- 1, Earliest Commitment-- 2</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PreRate(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, List<Service> services, SortType sortType, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }

        /// <inheritdoc />
        public List<ShipmentResponse> Rate(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, List<Service> services, SortType sortType, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            return null;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Rate event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest">ShipmentRequest object containg the shipment and package information that was rated.</param>
        /// <param name="services">List of Service Symbols to rate. Example: PSI.UPS.GND</param>
        /// <param name="sortType">Contains the int value for the sort order of the returned list of ShipmentResponse objects.
        /// No Order-- 0, Lowest Rate-- 1, Earliest Commitment-- 2</param>
        /// <param name="shipmentResponses">List of ShipmentResponse objects containing the Rate event results.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PostRate(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, List<ShipmentResponse> shipmentResponses, List<Service> services, SortType sortType, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }
        #endregion

        #region CloseManifest Rules

        /// Business rules hook that fires before the CloseManifest event.

        /// <param name="packages">List of Package objects containing the package(s) that were closed out.</param>

        ///<summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires before the CreateGroup event.

        /// <param name="carrier">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>
        /// <param name="groupType">Grouping Symbol.</param>

        {

        #endregion

        #region Modify Package List Rules
        ///<summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires before the ModifyPackageList event.
        /// </summary>

        {

        }

        /// Business rules hook that fires after the ModifyPackageList event.

        /// <param name="modifyPackageListResult">Modify Package List Result.</param>
        /// <param name="package">Package.</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PostModifyPackageList(string carrier, ModifyPackageListResult modifyPackageListResult, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }
        #endregion

        #region Transmit Rules
        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Transmit event.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="carrier">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>
        /// <param name="shipper">ShipExec Shipper Symbol. Example: TEX</param>
        /// <param name="itemsToTransmit">Transmit file symbolic name. Example: DOM_2_20000310_1_1</param>
        /// <param name="userParams">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>
        public void PreTransmit(string carrier, string shipper, List<TransmitItem> itemsToTransmit, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {

        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the Transmit event.
        /// </summary>

{"fixes":[{"file":"SoxBusinessRules.cs","fullContent":"using System.Collections.Generic;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\nusing PSI.Sox.Packing;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Sox Business Rules Object \n    /// </summary>\n    /// <remarks>This class requires a reference to PSI.Sox.dll</remarks>\n    /// <remarks>The connection_strings property has been removed. Connection strings are now accessible through the management layer.</remarks>\n    [BusinessRuleMetadata(Author = \"Chris Phillips\", AuthorEmail = \"cle5cap@ups.com\", CompanyId = \"0be765a7-52f4-4eff-8ade-84c22b219365\", Description = \"Template Code ShipExec 2 Business Rules\", Name = \"TemplateCodeSBR\", Version = \"1\")]\n    public class SoxBusinessRules : IBusinessObject\n    {\n        #region Properties\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or set the management layer object\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <remarks>This property is populated when the SoxBusinessRules class is implemented by the management\n        /// layer and contains an instance of IManagmentLayer.</remarks>\n        public IBusinessObjectApi BusinessObjectApi { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or set Logger Object\n        /// </summary>\n        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Profile for a given user context.\n        /// </summary>\n        public IProfile Profile { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        ///     BusinessRuleSettings\n        /// </summary>\n        public List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings { get; set; }\n\n        public ClientContext ClientContext { get; set; }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Load\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that returns a ShipmentRequest object.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"value\">String value containing an order number, etc.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\">ShipmentRequest object passed in containing the current shipment information if called from a ShipExec Client.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// <returns>ShipmentRequest object.</returns>        \n        public ShipmentRequest Load(string value, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            // Load\n            //if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))\n            //{\n            //    throw new Exception(\"You did not input a valid ordernumber/scancode.\");\n            //}\n            //else\n            //{\n            //    LoadShipment loadShipment = new LoadShipment(Logger);\n\n            //    shipmentRequest = loadShipment.GetShipmentRequest(value, shipmentRequest, userParams, BusinessRuleSettings);\n            //}\n        \n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion Load\n\n        #region Ship Rules\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook fires before the Ship event.\n        /// </summary>        \n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\">ShipmentRequest object containing the current shipment information.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n            // PreShip Hook — fires on the server immediately BEFORE ShipExec sends\n            // the shipment to the carrier adapter.\n            // This is the authoritative enforcement point for the Marken biological\n            // returns workflow, because UI-only rules can be bypassed by saved/API data.\n            // Blueprint Phase 1: enforce paperless invoice, export reason, biological\n            // sample package extras, dry ice conversion, and carrier/service selection.\n            // We delegate all business logic to a dedicated manager so this class stays\n            // thin and the rules can be unit-tested independently.\n            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n            // Step 1: Instantiate the manager with the server dependencies it needs.\n            var mgr = new BiologicalReturnsRulesManager(Logger, BusinessObjectApi, Profile, BusinessRuleSettings, ClientContext);\n            // Step 2: Delegate the PreShip enforcement to the manager.\n            // The manager will inspect country lane, temperature, biological sample,\n            // and MiscReference fields, then mutate shipmentRequest as required.\n            mgr.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the Ship event.\n        /// </summary>        \n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\">ShipmentRequest object containing the current shipment information.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n            // Ship Hook — fires on the server after PreShip and before the default\n            // carrier transaction is executed.\n            // This blueprint uses Ship as a backup strategy only: if the client-side\n            // Pickup Request/save flow did not attach a pickup, the server can create or\n            // associate one using user profile/custom data and configured defaults.\n            // Blueprint Phase 1: provide a fallback pickup association path so return\n            // labels can still be processed reliably for non-Canada pickup locations.\n            // We delegate the pickup logic to a dedicated manager to keep the hook thin\n            // and to isolate idempotency checks away from the SBR shell.\n            // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n            // Step 1: Instantiate the pickup manager with all required dependencies.\n            var mgr = new PickupAssociationManager(Logger, BusinessObjectApi, Profile, BusinessRuleSettings, ClientContext);\n            // Step 2: Delegate shipment-level pickup fallback handling.\n            // The manager can return a custom ShipmentResponse if it fully handles the\n            // ship operation, or null to allow ShipExec to continue with default shipping.\n            return mgr.Ship(shipmentRequest, pickup, shipWithoutTransaction, print, userParams);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Ship event.\n        /// </summary>        \n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\">ShipmentRequest object containing the shipment that was shipped.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentResponse\">ShipmentResponse object containing the Ship event result.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, ShipmentResponse shipmentResponse, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            if (shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode == 0)\n            {\n                Tools Tools = new Tools(Logger);\n                \n                shipmentResponse = Tools.SuppressPrintingCommericalInvoice(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse);\n            }\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Reprocess Rules\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Reprocess event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"globalMsns\">Global Msns.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreReprocess(string carrier, List<long> globalMsns, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Reprocess event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"globalMsns\">Global Msns.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"reProcessResponse\">ReProcess Response.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostReprocess(string carrier, List<long> globalMsns, ReProcessResult reProcessResponse, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Print Rules\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Print event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"documentRequest\">SoxDocument object containing the document information to print.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"printerMapping\">Printer object containg the printer to print to.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"package\">Package object containg the package information for the document being printed.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PrePrint(DocumentRequest documentRequest, PrinterMapping printerMapping, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the Print event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"document\">SoxDocument object containing the document information to print.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"printerMapping\">Printer object containg the printer to print to.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"package\">Package object containg the package information for the document being use.</param>\n        public void PostPrint(DocumentRequest document, DocumentResponse documentResponse, PrinterMapping printerMapping, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"groupType\">Grouping Symbol.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreCloseGroup(string carrier, string groupType, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the CloseGroup event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"groupType\">Grouping Symbol.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"group\">Group object.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostCloseGroup(string carrier, string groupType, Group group, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the CreateGroup event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"groupType\">Grouping Symbol.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\">PackageRequest object.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// \n        public void PreCreateGroup(string carrier, string groupType, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the CreateGroup event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"groupType\">Grouping Symbol.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"group\">Group object.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\">PackageRequest object.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// \n        public void PostCreateGroup(string carrier, string groupType, Group group, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        ///  Business rules hook that fires before the ModifyGroup event.\n        ///  </summary>\n        ///  <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        ///  <param name=\"groupId\"></param>\n        ///  <param name=\"groupType\">Grouping Symbol.</param>\n        ///  <param name=\"packageRequest\">PackageRequest object.</param>\n        ///  <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        ///  \n        public void PreModifyGroup(string carrier, long groupId, string groupType, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        ///  Business rules hook that fires after the ModifyGroup event.\n        ///  </summary>\n        ///  <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        ///  <param name=\"group\">Group</param>\n        ///  <param name=\"groupType\">Grouping Symbol.</param>\n        ///  <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostModifyGroup(string carrier, Group group, string groupType, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Modify Package List Rules\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the ModifyPackageList event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"globalMsns\">Global Msns.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"package\">Package.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreModifyPackageList(string carrier, List<long> globalMsns, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        ///<summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the ModifyPackageList event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"modifyPackageListResult\">Modify Package List Result.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"package\">Package.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostModifyPackageList(string carrier, ModifyPackageListResult modifyPackageListResult, Package package, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Transmit Rules\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Transmit event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipper\">ShipExec Shipper Symbol. Example: TEX</param>\n        /// <param name=\"itemsToTransmit\">Transmit file symbolic name. Example: DOM_2_20000310_1_1</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreTransmit(string carrier, string shipper, List<TransmitItem> itemsToTransmit, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the Transmit event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipper\">ShipExec Shipper Symbol. Example: TEX</param>\n        /// <param name=\"itemsToTransmit\">Transmit file symbolic name. Example: DOM_2_20000310_1_1</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public List<TransmitItemResult> Transmit(string carrier, string shipper, List<TransmitItem> itemsToTransmit, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the Transmit event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"carrier\">ShipExec Carrier Symbol. Example: CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS</param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipper\">ShipExec Shipper Symbol. Example: TEX</param>\n        /// <param name=\"itemsToTransmit\">List of transmit file symbolic names that were transmitted. Example: DOM_2_20000310_1_1</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostTransmit(string carrier, string shipper, List<TransmitItem> itemsToTransmit, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Batch\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that sets the list of batch references displayed on the Batch screen in the shipping client.\n        /// </summary>       \n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SerializableDictionary that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// <returns>List of BatchReference</returns>\n        public List<BatchReference> GetBatchReferences(SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that loads a batch.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchReference\">Batch Reference</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// <returns>BatchRequest</returns>\n        public BatchRequest LoadBatch(string batchReference, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook to parse a custom file of batch records.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchReference\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"fileStream\">File to be parsed</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// <returns></returns>\n        public BatchRequest ParseBatchFile(string batchReference, System.IO.Stream fileStream, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the ProcessBatch event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchRequest\">ProcessBatchRequest object containing the information for the batch to be processed.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"batchActions\">Batch Actions</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreProcessBatch(BatchRequest batchRequest, ProcessBatchActions batchActions, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the ProcessBatch event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchRequest\">ProcessBatchRequest object containing the information for the batch that was processed.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"batchActions\">Batch Actions</param>\n        /// <param name=\"processBatchResult\">ProcessBatchResponse object containing the response from the ProcessBatch operation.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostProcessBatch(BatchRequest batchRequest, ProcessBatchActions batchActions, ProcessBatchResult processBatchResult, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Pack\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the PackRate event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"packingRateRequest\">PackRateRequest object containing the information for the package to be pack rated.</param>        \n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PrePackRate(PackingRateRequest packingRateRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after a PackRate event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"packingRateRequest\">PackRateRequest object containing the information for the package that was pack rated.</param>        \n        /// <param name=\"packingRateResponse\">PackRateResponse object containing the response from the PackRate operation.</param>        \n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostPackRate(PackingRateRequest packingRateRequest, PackingRateResponse packingRateResponse, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the Pack event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"packingRequest\">PackRequest object containing the information for the package to be packed.</param>        \n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PrePack(PackingRequest packingRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after a Pack event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"packingRequest\">PackRequest object containing the information for the package that was packed.</param>        \n        /// <param name=\"packingResponse\">PackResponse object containing the response from the Pack operation.</param>        \n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostPack(PackingRequest packingRequest, PackingResponse packingResponse, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Address Validation\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires before the AddressValidation event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"nameAddress\">NameAddress object containing the address information to be validated.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"useSimpleNameAddress\">Boolean flag to convert the Sox NameAddress object to a Progistics SimpleNameAddress object</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PreAddressValidation(NameAddress nameAddress, bool useSimpleNameAddress, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that can be used to override the AddressValidation event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"nameAddress\">NameAddress object containing the address information to be validated.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"useSimpleNameAddress\">Boolean flag to convert the Sox NameAddress object to a Progistics SimpleNameAddress object</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        /// <returns><![CDATA[ List<NameAddressValidationDandidate> ]]></returns>\n        public List<NameAddressValidationCandidate> AddressValidation(NameAddress nameAddress, bool useSimpleNameAddress, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that fires after the AddressValidation event.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"nameAddress\">NameAddress object containing the address information that was sent for validation.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"addressValidationCandidates\">List of NameAddressValidationCandidate objects containing possible corrected addresses for the address that was validated. If only one candidate is returned then it SHOULD be the correct address.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that can be used to pass in key/value pairs for custom use.</param>\n        public void PostAddressValidation(NameAddress nameAddress, List<NameAddressValidationCandidate> addressValidationCandidates, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Misc\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that sets the list of box types displayed on the shipping screen in the shipping client.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"definedBoxTypes\">Box types from profile</param>\n        /// <returns>SoxDictionary</returns>\n        public List<BoxType> GetBoxTypes(List<BoxType> definedBoxTypes)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook to load a distribution list\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"value\">Distribution list value.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\">ShipmentRequest object containing the shipment information to be shipped.</param>\n        /// <param name=\"userParams\">SoxDictionary object that contins box types that will be displayed in the shipping client.</param>\n        /// <returns><![CDATA[ List<ShipmentRequest> ]]></returns>\n        public List<ShipmentRequest> LoadDistributionList(string value, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that is exposed through the IwcfShip interface for users interacting with ShipExec through the API.\n        /// </summary>       \n        /// <param name=\"userObject\">An object passed in from the API call.</param>\n        /// <returns>object</returns>\n        public object UserMethod(object userObject)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that sets the list of available commodity contents that are available on the commodities screen in the shipping client.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"definedCommodityContents\">Commodity Contents from profile.</param>\n        /// <returns>List of Commodity Content</returns>\n        public List<CommodityContent> GetCommodityContents(List<CommodityContent> definedCommodityContents)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Business rules hook that sets the list of available hazmat contents that are available on the hazmat screen in the shipping client.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"definedHazmatContents\">Hazmat Contents from profile.</param>\n        /// <returns>List of Commodity Content</returns>\n        public List<HazmatContent> GetHazmatContents(List<HazmatContent> definedHazmatContents)\n        {\n            return null;\n        }\n        #endregion\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"BiologicalReturnsRulesManager.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Data;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Text.RegularExpressions;\nusing System.Globalization;\nusing PSI.Sox;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\nusing PSI.Sox.Configuration;\nusing PSI.Sox.Data;\nusing PSI.Sox.Licensing;\nusing PSI.Sox.ML;\nusing PSI.Sox.Print;\nusing PSI.Sox.Resources;\nusing PSI.Sox.Tools;\nusing PSI.Sox.Wcf;\n\npublic class BiologicalReturnsRulesManager {\n    private readonly ILogger _logger;\n    private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _api;\n    private readonly IProfile _profile;\n    private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _settings;\n    private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Creates the manager used by the PreShip hook to enforce shipment rules.\n    /// </summary>\n    public BiologicalReturnsRulesManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi api, IProfile profile, List<BusinessRuleSetting> settings, ClientContext clientContext) {\n        // Store logger for tracing the rule flow and any validation failures.\n        _logger = logger;\n        // Store ShipExec API access for any carrier/profile/history lookups needed by rules.\n        _api = api;\n        // Store the profile so service, shipper, and carrier metadata can be resolved.\n        _profile = profile;\n        // Store Commander settings so all routing/service keys remain configurable.\n        _settings = settings;\n        // Store the client context so downstream helpers can make user-aware decisions.\n        _clientContext = clientContext;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Enforces the biological returns shipment requirements before ship execution.\n    /// This method mutates the shipment request in place and throws on invalid data.\n    /// </summary>\n    public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams) {\n        _logger.LogInfo(this, \"SBR\", \"PreShip\", \"Start\", \"Beginning Marken biological returns enforcement\");\n        if (shipmentRequest == null) { throw new Exception(\"ShipmentRequest is required for Marken return processing.\"); }\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults = new Package(); }\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee == null) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = new NameAddress(); }\n        if (shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0) { shipmentRequest.Packages = new List<PackageRequest> { new PackageRequest() }; }\n        string pickupCountry = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == null ? string.Empty : shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country.ToString().Trim().ToUpperInvariant();\n        string shipFromCountry = string.Empty;\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country)) { shipFromCountry = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country.Trim().ToUpperInvariant(); }\n        bool isCrossBorder = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pickupCountry) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipFromCountry) && !string.Equals(pickupCountry, shipFromCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n        string temperature = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeReference == null ? string.Empty : shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeReference.ToString().Trim();\n        string biologicalFlag = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference4 == null ? string.Empty : shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference4.ToString().Trim();\n        string dryIceKgText = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference3 == null ? string.Empty : shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference3.ToString().Trim();\n        bool isBiologicalSample = string.Equals(biologicalFlag, \"true\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || string.Equals(biologicalFlag, \"1\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || string.Equals(biologicalFlag, \"yes\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n        if (isCrossBorder) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.CommercialInvoiceMethod = 1; shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ExportReason = \"Medical\"; }\n        if (isBiologicalSample) {\n            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.PackageExtras == null) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.PackageExtras = new SerializableDictionary(); }\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.PackageExtras[\"RESTRICTED_ARTICLE_TYPE\"] = \"32\";\n        }\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dryIceKgText)) {\n            double dryIceKg;\n            if (!double.TryParse(dryIceKgText, out dryIceKg)) { throw new Exception(\"Dry Ice Weight must be numeric when Temperature is Frozen.\"); }\n            double dryIceLb = dryIceKg * 2.2046226218d;\n            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.DryIceWeight == null) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.DryIceWeight = new Weight(); }\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.DryIceWeight.Amount = dryIceLb;\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.DryIceWeight.Units = \"LB\";\n            if (shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight == null) { shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight = new Weight(); }\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight.Amount = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight.Amount + dryIceLb;\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight.Units)) { shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight.Units = \"LB\"; }\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DryIcePurpose = 0;\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DryIceRegulationSet = string.Equals(pickupCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && string.Equals(shipFromCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? 0 : 1;\n        }\n        ApplyServiceRouting(shipmentRequest, pickupCountry, shipFromCountry, isCrossBorder, isBiologicalSample);\n        _logger.LogInfo(this, \"SBR\", \"PreShip\", \"End\", \"Completed Marken biological returns enforcement\");\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Resolves the service symbol required by the blueprint for the active lane.\n    /// This helper isolates routing decisions so the main rule method remains readable.\n    /// </summary>\n    private void ApplyServiceRouting(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, string pickupCountry, string shipFromCountry, bool isCrossBorder, bool isBiologicalSample) {\n        string domesticPreferred = GetSetting(\"BiologicalReturns.Service.USDomesticPreferred\", \"CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDA\");\n        string domesticFallback = GetSetting(\"BiologicalReturns.Service.USDomesticFallback\", \"CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDA\");\n        string internationalPreferred = GetSetting(\"BiologicalReturns.Service.InternationalPreferred\", \"CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXP\");\n        string internationalFallback = GetSetting(\"BiologicalReturns.Service.InternationalFallback\", \"CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.SVR\");\n        string targetServiceSymbol = isCrossBorder ? internationalPreferred : domesticPreferred;\n        if (isBiologicalSample) { targetServiceSymbol = isCrossBorder ? internationalPreferred : domesticPreferred; }\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service == null) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = new Service(); }\n        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol = targetServiceSymbol;\n        bool needsFallback = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol);\n        if (needsFallback) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol = isCrossBorder ? internationalFallback : domesticFallback; }\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper) && _profile != null && _profile.Shippers != null && _profile.Shippers.Count > 0) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper = _profile.Shippers[0].Name; }\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms)) { shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = \"Prepaid\"; }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Reads a business rule setting by key and falls back to a default value.\n    /// </summary>\n    private string GetSetting(string key, string defaultValue) {\n        Tools tools = new Tools(_logger);\n        string value = tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(key, _settings);\n        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? defaultValue : value;\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"PickupAssociationManager.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Data;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Text.RegularExpressions;\nusing System.Globalization;\nusing PSI.Sox;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\nusing PSI.Sox.Configuration;\nusing PSI.Sox.Data;\nusing PSI.Sox.Licensing;\nusing PSI.Sox.ML;\nusing PSI.Sox.Print;\nusing PSI.Sox.Resources;\nusing PSI.Sox.Tools;\nusing PSI.Sox.Wcf;\n\npublic class PickupAssociationManager {\n    private readonly ILogger _logger;\n    private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _api;\n    private readonly IProfile _profile;\n    private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _settings;\n    private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Creates the pickup manager used by the Ship hook.\n    /// </summary>\n    public PickupAssociationManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi api, IProfile profile, List<BusinessRuleSetting> settings, ClientContext clientContext) {\n        // Store the logger so we can trace pickup fallback decisions.\n        _logger = logger;\n        // Store the API in case the implementation later needs to create or persist a pickup record.\n        _api = api;\n        // Store the profile so pickup defaults can be derived from user/site context.\n        _profile = profile;\n        // Store the configurable settings so pickup behavior can be controlled without code changes.\n        _settings = settings;\n        // Store the client context so user-specific fallback data can be resolved.\n        _clientContext = clientContext;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Provides a fallback pickup association path for the Ship hook.\n    /// Returning null allows ShipExec to continue with normal shipping.\n    /// </summary>\n    public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams) {\n        _logger.LogInfo(this, \"SBR\", \"Ship\", \"Start\", \"Evaluating server-side pickup fallback\");\n        bool enabled = string.Equals(GetSetting(\"BiologicalReturns.PickupFallbackEnabled\", \"false\"), \"true\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n        if (!enabled) { return null; }\n        if (pickup != null) { return null; }\n        Pickup fallbackPickup = BuildPickupFromShipment(shipmentRequest);\n        if (fallbackPickup == null) { return null; }\n        _logger.LogInfo(this, \"SBR\", \"Ship\", \"End\", \"Pickup fallback prepared; allowing default ship flow to continue\");\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Builds a pickup object from shipment and profile data.\n    /// </summary>\n    private Pickup BuildPickupFromShipment(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest) {\n        if (shipmentRequest == null || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee == null) {\n            return null;\n        }\n        Pickup pickup = new Pickup();\n        pickup.PickupAddress = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;\n        pickup.DestinationCountryCode = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country;\n        pickup.PickupReferenceNumber = BuildPickupReference(shipmentRequest);\n        return pickup;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Builds a readable pickup reference from shipment values.\n    /// </summary>\n    private string BuildPickupReference(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest) {\n        string prefix = GetSetting(\"BiologicalReturns.PickupDefaultReferencePrefix\", \"MARKEN\");\n        string shipRef = shipmentRequest != null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference) ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference : \"UNKNOWN\";\n        return prefix + \"-\" + shipRef;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Reads a business rule setting with a fallback default value.\n    /// </summary>\n    private string GetSetting(string key, string defaultValue) {\n        Tools tools = new Tools(_logger);\n        string value = tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(key, _settings);\n        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? defaultValue : value;\n    }\n}\n"}]}
